subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the choice wine of My presence, who standest before My countenance, and who art stationed at the gate of My majesty! Hearken unto My call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شارب رحیق لقائی و الحاضر امام وجهی و القائم لدی باب عظمتی اسمع ندآئی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @mystical themes, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
